ballot_measures.number: Marsy's Law Crime Victims Rights Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Marsy's Law Crime Victims Rights Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Amend the list of crime victims' rights in the constitution. This legislatively referred constitutional amendment is on the Tennessee 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.title: Prohibit State Property Taxes Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Prohibit the legislature from enacting taxes on property. This legislatively referred constitutional amendment is on the Tennessee 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.number: Remove Right to Bail for Certain Criminal Offenses Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Remove Right to Bail for Certain Criminal Offenses Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Remove the right to bail for specified criminal offenses. This legislatively referred constitutional amendment is on the Tennessee 2026 ballot.
